message:
fix: add clippy allow annotations and apply rustfmt across 647 test files

Bulk cleanup pass across all integration and unit test files in
crates/franken-engine/tests/ to suppress expected test-code clippy
diagnostics and enforce consistent formatting:

- Add crate-level #![allow(clippy::...)] blocks to every test file,
  covering field_reassign_with_default, assertions_on_constants,
  useless_vec, clone_on_copy, unnecessary_get_then_check, len_zero,
  needless_borrows_for_generic_args, too_many_arguments, identity_op,
  and manual_abs_diff — all of which are intentional patterns in test
  code (explicit assertions, clarity-over-efficiency, exhaustive setup)
- Reorder use-declaration groups alphabetically per rustfmt conventions
- Reformat function call arguments, assert macro arguments, and match
  arms to comply with rustfmt line-width limits
- Expand compressed multi-argument constructor calls into multi-line
  form for readability

No test logic changes — all modifications are lint suppression and
formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
